messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Recreate a topic from scratch by replaying its serialised record — the round trip is the acceptance test
What it solves: THIS IS THE SLICE THAT PROVES THE DESIGN. The point of serialising (BL-329) is that the topic
becomes a PROJECTION of durable repo state — disposable, because it can always be rebuilt.
Nothing demonstrates that except actually rebuilding it. So the ROUND TRIP — serialise ->
delete -> recreate, cont…
How it works: The round trip holds — serialise, delete, recreate, content matches

messages.author: swarm
